---
title: "Getting Health Insurance"
---

```{r}
#| include: false
if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")
pacman::p_load(tidyverse, ggplot2, gganimate, gapminder, scales, hrbrthemes, OECD, here, png, gifski, magick, pdftools)
```

One area where the U.S. health care system is relatively unique is that we have a very fragmented way of providing health insurance. The purpose of this chapter is to describe the different ways people receive health insurance in the U.S.

## Employer Sponsored Insurance
One common term you might hear surrounding health insurance is **managed care**. 

## Non-group and small-group insurance

## Medicare

## Medicare Advantage

## Medicaid

## Veterans Administration
